things.name: Hoan Kiem Lake & Ngoc Son Temple
things.description: Hanoi's spiritual heart — peaceful lake with the red Huc bridge leading to the ancient Jade Island Temple

things.name: Hoi An Ancient Town Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage lantern-lit ancient trading port — a 1-hour flight south for a weekend escape

things.name: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum & Museum
things.description: The preserved embalmed body of Vietnam's revolutionary leader in a granite mausoleum on Ba Dinh Square

things.name: Hanoi Old Quarter
things.description: 36 ancient guild streets — explore by walking or cyclo, with street food at every turn

things.name: Ha Long Bay Cruise
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage limestone karst seascape — overnight junk cruise with kayaking and cave visits

things.name: Vietnam Museum of Ethnology
things.description: Outstanding museum of Vietnam's 54 ethnic groups with life-size outdoor traditional village buildings

things.name: Temple of Literature
things.description: Vietnam's first national university (1070) — a peaceful Confucian temple with beautiful courtyard gardens

things.name: Hoa Lo Prison Museum
things.description: The original Hanoi Hilton — French colonial prison used to hold Vietnamese revolutionaries and US POWs

things.name: Bun Cha Street Food Lunch
things.description: Hanoi's most beloved dish — grilled pork meatballs in broth with noodles (made famous by Obama and Bourdain)

things.name: Thang Long Water Puppet Theatre
things.description: Traditional Vietnamese folk art performed on water by hidden puppeteers — uniquely Hanoian
